title: Extreme Polypharmacy Cascade Audit
instruction: Conduct a full safety audit of this 82-year-old male patient on 15 medications with 10 chronic conditions. This is an extreme polypharmacy case where drug side effects cascade into each other. This case has 150 records over 7 years. Look for: (1) dual anticoagulant/antiplatelet therapy without a current indication, (2) a narrow therapeutic index drug becoming toxic as kidney function declines and electrolytes shift, (3) a diabetes drug causing recurrent dangerous hypoglycemia episodes in the setting of kidney disease, (4) sedating medications inappropriate for elderly patients causing falls and fractures, (5) a drug class-effect being ignored when switching between drugs in the same class, (6) long-term PPI causing cascading nutritional deficiencies that feed into other drug toxicities. You need to find 6 separate issues.
